creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 148927
Output from portlint; make clean && make check-plist; make stage-qa

I have attached the output of the tests you asked for.

I only have a FreeNAS box (no FreeBSD installation), so I cannot run poudriere (it doesn't work in a jail yet on FreeNAS). However, you gave me the idea of running it in a virtual machine - I will give that a try now and attach that output if I succeed.
